rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-483335 WITH CASE PES-08-290861
rulings.Rulings: The matter on calendar for Monday, Februaury 23, 2009, Line 1 PETITIONER GLORIA DRAHER'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-483335 WITH CASE PES-08-290861 IS DENIED GIVEN THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE IN THE PROBATE MATTER, THE UNCERTAINTY CONCERNING WHO IS REPRESENTING THE ESTATE IN THE CIVIL MATTER AND THE LIKELIHOOD THAT THE RESOLUTION OF THE PROBATE MATTER WOULD RESOLVE THE CIVIL MATTER. =(301/PJB)
